results.rendered_html:
mṛdhra (von mardh)
1〉 adj. Verächter, Feind: ghnanmṛdhrāṇyapa dviṣo dahanrakṣāṃsi viśvahā  ṚV. 8,43,26 .
— 2〉 n. pl. Verachtung, Schmähung: purāgne duritebhyaḥ purā mṛdhrebhyaḥ kave . pra ṇa āyurvaso tira 44,30 .
— Vgl. amṛdhra.
